title: Gooey Caramelized American Pecan Tagine
description: A nutty and flaky American dish featuring caramelized pecans, perfect for a brunch mood, made in a tagine pot and dairy-free friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the coconut oil, vanilla extract, and non-dairy milk to the bowl and stir until a dough forms.
Transfer the dough to a tagine pot and spread it out evenly.
Bake the tagine for 35 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
While the tagine is baking, prepare the caramel sauce by melting the caster sugar in a saucepan over medium heat.
Once the sugar has melted, add the egg replacement and stir until the sauce is smooth.
Remove the tagine from the oven and pour the caramel sauce over the top.
Return the tagine to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the caramel is bubbly and golden brown.
